title: Journal of Spending
subtitleProgress: Question {{current}} of {{total}}: Reflect on your spending habits!

stages.prompt: Describe a recent purchase you made. What influenced your decision? Was it a need or a want? How did you feel before, during, and after the purchase?
Track your spending for one day. List all purchases, no matter how small. What patterns do you notice? Which expenses surprised you?
Think about a time you spent money impulsively. What were the circumstances? How did you feel afterward? What would you do differently now?
Compare your spending habits with your financial goals. Where are you aligning well? Where might adjustments be needed?
Describe your ideal approach to money management. What habits would support this vision? What steps can you take this week to move toward this ideal?
